items.name: google-ai-edge/gallery
items.desc: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.

items.name: Blaizzy/mlx-vlm
items.desc: MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.

items.name: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
items.desc: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

items.name: block/goose
items.desc: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

items.name: onyx-dot-app/onyx
items.desc: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

items.name: badlogic/pi-mono
items.desc: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

items.name: dmtrKovalenko/fff.nvim
items.desc: The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS

items.name: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
items.desc: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
